recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Ghost Ship
recommendations.overview: After discovering a passenger ship missing since 1962 floating adrift on the Bering Sea, salvagers claim the vessel as their own. Once they begin towing the ghost ship towards harbor, a series of bizarre occurrences happen and the group becomes trapp

recommendations.title: When the Bough Breaks
recommendations.overview: A surrogate mother harbors a deadly secret desire for a family of her own with the husband who is expecting to raise her child.

recommendations.title: Pressure
recommendations.overview: Four divers are stuck deep underwater in a vessel after a freak storm destroys their ship. Will they survive?

recommendations.title: Ripper Untold
recommendations.overview: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve a series of horrific murders in Victorian London - but one of them harbors a deadly secret.

recommendations.title: Death Ship
recommendations.overview: Survivors of a tragic shipping collision are rescued by a mysterious black ship which appears out of the fog. Little do they realise that the ship is actually a Nazi torture ship which has sailed the seas for years, luring unsuspecting sailors aboard

recommendations.title: Dead Calm
recommendations.overview: An Australian couple takes a sailing trip in the Pacific to get over the recent loss of their son. While on the open sea, they come across a sinking ship with one survivor who is not at all what he seems.

recommendations.title: Captains Courageous
recommendations.overview: Harvey, the arrogant and spoiled son of an indulgent absentee-father, falls overboard from a transatlantic steamship and is rescued by a fishing vessel on the Grand Banks. Harvey fails to persuade them to take him ashore, nor convince the crew of his

recommendations.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
recommendations.overview: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. Exactly one year later, the deadly secret resurfaces as they're stalked by a hook-handed figure.

recommendations.title: Leviathan
recommendations.overview: An experimental portrait of the North American commercial fishing industry through the lens of GoPro cameras placed on a fishing vessel off the coast of New England.
